case_title: YUMENG HOGAN VS. LANE FERTILITY INSTITUTE

docket_entries.description: REMARK: RETURN MAIL RECD 9/22/21. CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO LANE FERTILITY INSTITUTE-RETURN TO SENDER/NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED
JUDGMENT ASSIGNED BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR HOGAN, YUMENG ASSIGNED TO CREDIT CONSULTING SERVICES, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION
REMARK: JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFEDANT RETURNED, NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED [WRIT ISSUED 10-04-2022] AS TO DEFENDANT LANE FERTILITY INSTITUTE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-08-2021 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO OCT-12-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF YUMENG HOGAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LANE FERTILITY INSTITUTE IS NOT PRESENT. CASE CONTINUED TO BE HEARD WITH CASES CSM-21-864529 AND CSM-21-864654. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $637.85 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT LANE FERTILITY INSTITUTE
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: MONCRIEF, PAUL SUBSTITUTED FOR PRO PER AS ATTORNEY FOR CREDIT CONSULTING SERVICES, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,693.73 FILED BY HOGAN, YUMENG AS TO DEFENDANT LANE FERTILITY INSTITUTE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-08-2021 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00); REMARKS: MR. MARK MCKENNA, CHIEF OPERATING OFFICER FOR LANE FERTILITY INSTITUTE, CAME TO S.F CITY HALL AND WAS SERVED THE DOCUMENTS SERVED JUL-19-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LANE FERTILITY INSTITUTE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-12-2021 - JUDGMENT.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY ASSIGNEE CREDIT CONSULTING SERVICES, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT LANE FERTILITY INSTITUTE
ORDER TO CONTINUE CASE TO BE HEARD WITH CASES CSM-21-864529 & CSM-21-864654.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-12-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-12-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF YUMENG HOGAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LANE FERTILITY INSTITUTE IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOGAN, YUMENG RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LANE FERTILITY INSTITUTE $6,693.73 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,783.73, JULY 2019 TRAVEL REIMBURSEMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $1,981.96 ACCRUED INTEREST, $80.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT LANE FERTILITY INSTITUTE
